Interface INDVIFunctionArguments3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control NDVI function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FDAF4A17-AC0A-4CC7-9E95-EE022FC0D928")]
public interface INDVIFunctionArguments3 : INDVIFunctionArguments2, INDVIFunctionArguments
